title: Mapping Water Scarcity and Aridity Trends in U.S. Drought Hotspots: Observed Patterns and CMIP6 Projections
description: SpeakForWater Episode 1: Mapping Water Scarcity and Aridity Trends in U.S. Drought Hotspots: Observed Patterns and CMIP6 Projections. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
